label: Heat broad
expectation: Broad heat search should return decisions without needing a code filter.

label: Heat + G49
expectation: Heat should stay broad while G49 nudges results toward lack-of-heat decisions.

label: Heat + G50
expectation: Heat should surface inadequate-heat decisions under G50 without collapsing recall.

label: Hot water + G52
expectation: Hot water should surface lack-of-hot-water decisions when G52 is selected.

label: Hot water + G53
expectation: Hot water should surface inadequate-hot-water decisions when G53 is selected.

label: Mold + G64
expectation: Mold should return issue-relevant decisions and avoid substring drift.

label: Cockroach + G44
expectation: Cockroach should not collapse to zero even if the code coverage is legacy-heavy.

label: Rodent + G76
expectation: Rodent should surface likely infestation decisions and conclusions/findings passages.

label: Bed bugs + G40.1
expectation: Bed bug searches should remain retrievable under the specific DHS code.

label: Infestation + G54
expectation: Generic infestation should still return results when a broader insect-infestation code is selected.

label: Decrease in services + G27
expectation: Decrease-in-services issues should continue to return substantial-service-loss decisions.

label: Rent reduction + G76
expectation: Broad rent-reduction queries should still include rodent-related decisions when G76 is selected.
